meaning: adj.(因熟透而)醇香的、甘美的,(颜色)柔美的,(声音)圆润的,成熟的,老练的vt.&vi.使(变)醇香,使(变)柔美,使成熟
examples: His voice was deep and mellow.
Mellow music and lighting helped to create the right atmosphere.
His voice was deep and mellow and his speech had a soothing and comforting quality.
This hearty dish is the perfect prelude to a mellow afternoon of kayaking on the bottle-green lake.
Back in The Fantaisie, the music and the mood are mellow in the smoke.
